display.purpose: Application title and major section headings.

headline.purpose: Sparse editorial framing for detail pages and empty states.

body.purpose: Primary product UI text and prose.

label.purpose: Chips, column labels, compact tags, and metadata.

shadows.name: image-rest
shadows.purpose: Subtle edge for product images on paper surfaces.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for hover, focus, collapse, and refresh state transitions.

motion.name: fast-state
motion.purpose: Default state transition duration for product controls.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Compact high-confidence action for refresh or apply.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(17% 0.006 95); color: oklch(97% 0.006 88); border: 1px solid oklch(17% 0.006 95); border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 12px; font: 700 12px/1.2 ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; letter-spacing: 0; transition: background 160ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), border-color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(46% 0.085 158); border-color: oklch(46% 0.085 158); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(46% 0.085 158); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: oklch(17% 0.006 95); border: 1px solid oklch(72% 0.012 95); border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 10px; font: 700 12px/1.2 ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; letter-spacing: 0; transition: background 160ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), border-color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(94% 0.008 88); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(46% 0.085 158); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Availability, override, notification, or Run status label.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 3px; padding: 3px 6px; font: 700 12px/1.2 ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; letter-spacing: 0; border: 1px solid currentColor; } .ds-chip-available { background: oklch(91% 0.035 154); color: oklch(46% 0.085 158); }

components.name: Dashboard Table Row
components.description: Dense row treatment for Products, Events, and Runs.
components.html:
OpenAI Essentials Hoodie
Last seen 2m agoPublicly available
components.css: .ds-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(180px, 1fr) auto auto; gap: 12px; align-items: center; background: oklch(99% 0.004 88); color: oklch(17% 0.006 95); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(72% 0.012 95); padding: 10px 12px; font: 400 15px/1.5 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-row:hover { background: oklch(94% 0.008 88); } .ds-row-title { font-weight: 700; } .ds-row-meta { color: oklch(50% 0.012 95); } .ds-chip { border-radius: 3px; padding: 3px 6px; font: 700 12px/1.2 ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; border: 1px solid currentColor; } .ds-chip-available { background: oklch(91% 0.035 154); color: oklch(46% 0.085 158); }

components.name: Evidence Panel
components.description: Flat bordered panel for curated fields or collapsible raw evidence.
components.css: .ds-evidence { background: oklch(99% 0.004 88); color: oklch(17% 0.006 95); border: 1px solid oklch(72% 0.012 95); border-radius: 6px; padding: 16px; } .ds-evidence-label { margin-bottom: 8px; font: 700 12px/1.2 ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; color: oklch(50% 0.012 95); } .ds-evidence pre { margin: 0; overflow: auto; font: 400 13px/1.5 ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; }

narrative.overview: Supplywatch's dashboard translates the README image into a working product surface: warm paper, firm black type, thin rules, green annotations, and product evidence, tightened into a local read-only dashboard.
keyCharacteristics: Warm paper surfaces with tinted black text and thin ledger-like rules.
Restrained green accent for monitoring, confirmation, focus, and annotation.
Dense Product, Event, and Run views with stable labels and URLs.
Raw JSON and fingerprints treated as auditable evidence, not visual noise.
Familiar product controls: tables, filters, tabs, breadcrumbs, buttons, links.

rules.name: The Evidence Color Rule
rules.body: Green means monitored or confirmed, amber means uncertain or waiting, red means operational failure. Candidate evidence must not use the same treatment as confirmed public availability.

rules.name: The Serif Rationing Rule
rules.body: Serif is an accent for editorial framing. Tables, controls, badges, and data stay in the sans or mono stacks.

rules.name: The Flat Ledger Rule
rules.body: Do not wrap every page section in a card. Use full-width bands, rules, table structure, and panels only where grouping helps the workflow.

dos: Do lead with Products and make Events and Runs support the audit trail.
Do use Availability state in UI copy instead of buyable state.
Do distinguish candidate evidence from confirmed public availability with label, tone, and placement.
Do keep tables dense, stable, and URL-addressable.
Do use warm paper neutrals, thin rules, and sparse green annotations to echo the README image.
donts: Don't use admin panel, buyer UI, checkout UI, cart patterns, or language implying Supplywatch buys products.
Don't use dark blue observability defaults, purple gradients, neon accents, or decorative glassmorphism.
Don't treat animate-wiggle or candidate-signal Events as confirmed availability.
Don't hide raw evidence when a classification may need auditing.
Don't use thick colored side stripes on cards, callouts, alerts, or table rows.
